## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests where it made sense)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Screenshots attached for user-facing changes (demo mode: `npm run dev`)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md`) if behavior or setup changed
